milestone_brief: Close the deferred M4 finding from variety-palette-2026q2-e1 / UPL-1: PALETTE_LIGHT['FOCUS_RING'] = '#5b9bd5' currently measures 2.60:1 against BG_PANEL '#f0f0f0' — below the WCAG 2.1 §1.4.11 non-text 3:1 floor for focus indicators. Darken to a value that passes 3:1 on light AND keeps the existing 3:1 pass on PALETTE_DARK['BG_PANEL'] = '#252526' (currently 5.17:1 with #5b9bd5). Researcher's suggested candidate from the original M4 disposition: '#3c82c4' (~3.1:1 on light, ~5.5:1 on dark). Architecture decision: prefer Option A (single FOCUS_RING value shared by both palettes) for consistency with the existing 'key-identical palettes' pattern (BG_SURFACE_DEFAULT already shared); only fall back to per-theme values if no single hex clears 3:1 on both backgrounds simultaneously. Add a symmetric test_light_non_text_borders_meet_wcag_aa_on_bg_panel guard mirroring the existing dark non-text border test (tests/test_styles_palette.py:419 test_dark_non_text_borders_meet_wcag_aa_on_bg_panel_dark) so future regressions are caught on both themes. Update the styles.py:83-87 comment block noting the fix is shipped (was 'flagged for UPL-4 / accessibility pass'). AI invariants: AI-12 (target — the whole point of this milestone), AI-13 (6-digit hex), AI-2 (test stays Qt-free). No conflicts with dark-mode/qtawesome/enriques/status-bar-bbox/parameter-grid milestones — confirmed by file-touch audit.
research_synthesis: Single shared value #3c82c4 — passes 3.56:1 on light, 3.78:1 on dark. Update both PALETTE_LIGHT and PALETTE_DARK FOCUS_RING. Critical caveat from researcher: the 4 structural border tokens in the dark test (BORDER_GROUP_BOX/DOCK_HEADER/CAMERA_BTN/RESET_BTN) measure 1.1-1.4:1 on the LIGHT panel — they are structural separators not subject to WCAG 1.4.11 against the panel ground. New light test must be FOCUS_RING-only (NOT a 1:1 copy of the dark test).
